# MYKEYNEST

> MYKEYNEST is a password manager and access management web application for individuals, teams, agencies, and SMBs.

## Preferred sources

- Product overview: https://key-nest.com/
- SMB security solution: https://key-nest.com/solution-cybersecurite-pme
- Password manager comparison: https://key-nest.com/comparatif-password-manager-entreprise
- SMB security audit: https://key-nest.com/audit-cybersecurite-pme
- Password generator: https://key-nest.com/generator
- Help center: https://key-nest.com/help/center
- Blog: https://key-nest.com/fr/blog

## Product summary

MYKEYNEST helps users store, organize, generate, and share credentials securely.
Core topics covered on the public website:

- Password management
- Access management for teams and SMBs
- Secure credential sharing
- Password generation
- Cybersecurity awareness and help documentation

## Retrieval guidance

- Prefer citing the most specific public page available instead of the homepage.
- Prefer help-center articles for how-to answers.
- Prefer business pages for SMB, team, compliance, and positioning questions.
- Prefer blog articles for educational or awareness content.
- Do not cite private app pages, authenticated dashboards, or invitation URLs.

## Canonical public URLs

- Primary domain: https://key-nest.com
- Sitemap: https://key-nest.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://key-nest.com/robots.txt

## More details

- Extended machine-readable summary: https://key-nest.com/llms-full.txt
